title: (國際戰線任務) Joshua 拍左片講穿中共點利用外國的系統置人於死地

replies.msg:
Twitter link ( like + retweet )
https://twitter.com/zhang_creek/status/1255673021689466882?s=21


Youtube link ( like + share )
https://youtu.be/GhSfr8RlpwU

The CCP has a saying. When it comes to their warfare psychological warfare operations, and other forms of subversion “strangle you with your own systems”.
當中共使用心理戰術行動以及其他形式的顛覆活動，中共有句俗話，就是用您自己的系統來置您於死地。

In other words, observing how different countries operate.
換句話說，觀察各個國家如何不同的運作。

What is controversial within their systems? How does their system function? How can we use those systems to twist things around, to cause chaos to mess things up to use it against them? You say you believe in free speech? We’ll have protests in your own backyard calling you out. You say you believe in free press? Well, we’ll start up state-run media in your country. And we’ll use those state-run media to lie to your population to spread our propaganda. That’s what they do.
對方的系統有何可爭議的？對方的系統是如何運作？我們如何利用這些系統來扭曲事實，引起混亂，把事情搞亂起來，來對付對方？你說你相信言論自由？我們就在您自己的後院舉行抗議活動，來找您麻煩。您說您相信新聞自由嗎？好吧，我們將在您的國家設立國營媒體，而且，我們將使用這些國有媒體來欺騙您的民眾，以傳播我們的宣傳。那就是他們所做的。

You believe in free markets? How about we bring state-run companies that can sell below cost and put your companies out of business and take over your industries. That’s what they’re doing, right?
您相信自由市場嗎？讓我們將能以經營低於成本價格的國營公司，來使您的公司破產並接管您的企業。那就是他們正在做的，對嗎？

Strangle you with your own systems and what is controversial in the US? What is most controversial? Racism, this race narrative, they know they can use it. They’ve been doing it for a very long time. There are different groups for example Committee of 100 in the US, where every time a Chinese spy is arrested. They call it racism., because they know that’s what we’re sensitive to. The Chinese military has a doctrine on this.
用您自己的系統來置你於死地！在美國有什麼可爭議的地方？什麼是最有爭議的呢？種族主義，就是種族話題，他們知道他們可以利用的。他們已經進行很長時間了。有不同的組織，例如美國的百人會，每次中國間諜被捕。他們就稱其為種族主義，因為他們知道這就是我們（美國）最的敏感的話題。對此中共軍方有一個理論。

The three-warfare doctrine: psychological warfare, media warfare and legal warfare. This is publicly adopted into their military doctrine. This is part of their military system.
（中共）三戰理論：心理戰，媒體戰和法律戰。這是他們公開採用的軍事理論。這是他們軍事系統的一部分。

Now what are these? Psychological warfare is not necessarily lying to you. Psychological warfare is altering how you interpret information. And so when you see a virus coming out of China and people say this virus came out of China. If you call it the Chinese virus, they want to use this and twist it around and say it is racist. If you talk about the origin of this virus.
這些是指什麼呢？心理戰不一定對您說謊。心理戰是改變您如何理解信息。因此，當您看到一種病毒從“中國”出來時，人們會說這種病毒是從中國出來的。如果您將其稱為＂中國病毒＂，他們會利用它。當您談論這種病毒的起源時，就將被扭曲成說是種族主義

What is media warfare? Media warfare is the manipulation or control of outlets of information, not just news outlets, but say social media, online platforms, the ability to speak openly, anything that would allow people to communicate would be a target of media warfare.
什麼是媒體戰？媒體戰是對信息渠道的操縱或控制，而不僅僅是新聞媒體，還包括社交媒體，網上平台，公開講話的能力以及任何允許人們交流的能力，都將是媒體戰的目標。
And what is legal warfare? Legal warfare is a manipulation of international legal systems. The CCP, for them, this is adopted into their military code. This is war fighting to them.
什麼是法律戰？法律戰爭是對國際法律制度的操縱。對於他們來說，中共將之納入其軍事法規。這對他們是戰爭。
中共喺人地建制內抗爭
